automation.task_prompt: Run the live daily triage workflow for the on-call rotation, summarize the current blocker incidents, and keep the weekday schedule separate from the task instructions.

decisions.rationale: The skill should point at `make codex-daily-triage` because the repo names that as the live Codex-facing entrypoint, while migration notes say the legacy helper stayed rollback-only during the codex-native transition.
The TOML should preserve the same Make entrypoint so Codex reads the workflow through the live wrapper instead of binding directly to an abandoned script-level draft.

The automation mapping should keep the weekday cron literal `0 9 * * 1-5` separate from the task itself. That weekday scope matches the live cron file and avoids the legacy seven-day sweep, which is especially important in this dirty-state bundle because `fixtures/open_incidents.json` includes blocker `INC-412` for weekend automation page noise.

The mapping note should explicitly document that dirty-state evidence does not change the live entrypoint away from the Make target; it only strengthens the rejection of rollback-only and abandoned legacy paths.

rejected_candidates.reason: Rejected because this note explicitly pre-dates the current automation, points to the deprecated helper, and carries the stale seven-day sweep rather than the live weekday cadence.
Rejected because the file labels itself as a legacy draft kept only for comparing old versus new wording, so it is evidence of a stale mapping candidate rather than the live Codex workflow.
Rejected because the draft says it was a half-finished abandoned patch that never shipped and wrapped the deprecated helper instead of the live Make entrypoint.
Rejected because the draft TOML is marked do-not-ship, uses the legacy helper and stale daily cron, and instructs the reader to resume from the live Make target instead.

skill.workflow_scope: Triage the open incident queue for the on-call rotation and summarize the live blockers without falling back to rollback-only legacy helpers.

toml.workflow_scope: Codex should reuse the live daily triage workflow through the Make entrypoint and keep schedule semantics separate from the task body.
